title: Toys for 2 3 4 5 Year Old Boy, Baby Toy for Early Learning, Whack A Crab Game for Toddlers with Sound&Light Birthday Gifts Toys for Kids Age 6 Girl Hammering Pounding Toy, Baby Early Developmental Toy
features: 5 MODE KIDS TOY- It has 5 modes, from single player, 2 player competitive mode, memory mode, single note music mode and more. The classic whack-a-mole has an interactive little crab that rolls out if you do well during a game. The Whack-A-Crab is the perfect interactive toy for both children and adults to enjoy together, competing to see who can get a better score.

FUN AND EDUCATIONAL TOY- The Pound-a-Mole with its cute crab characters and fun sounds and music, it encourages natural curiosity and promotes important developmental skills such as fine motor skills, counting skills, hand-eye coordination, and color recognition.

COOL LIGHTS AND ENGAGING GAME SOUND EFFECTS- This hammer game involves hitting the glowing crabs with the hammer to score points. Comes with two hammers so kids can compete with friends and parents, and the game comes with music and lights to keep you and your kids entertained.

NO SCREEN TIME & FAMILY GAME- A game of whack-a-mole that can be interacted with, let your kids put down their iPads, cell phones, and TVs for a while.For birthdays, family gatherings, indoor-outdoor entertainment, carnival prizes, or special occasions like Christmas, Easter, and Halloween, this game will bring joy and excitement to children aged 3-10.

SAFE MATERIALS & SOFT HAMMER- The whack a Crab game is constructed from ABS eco-friendly plastic, making it BPA-free, non-toxic, and environmentally friendly. The accessories have a smooth surface with no sharp edges, ensuring that it will not cause any harm to a baby's delicate skin. The whack a mole / crab game with soft hammer, you don't need to worry about the hammer security issue. Excellent toys gift for toddlers kids boys girls 2 3 4 5 6 years old.

GIFT FOR 2 - 8 YEARS OLD KIDS - Whack-A-Crab game is a fantastic gift option for boys and girls aged 3 and above. It combines the features of a hammer toy, light-up toy, pounding toy, and educational game, providing a multifaceted play experience. This pounding kid toy is an ideal birthday gift, Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and New Year gift for boys and girls aged 3, 4, 5, 6 years old.
